name: Reaper Rules
short_description: Mix 2D platforming, action, and mystery in a compact adventure designed to be played in a single sitting. Reaper Rules is short, challenging, and full of personality.
detailed_description:
Reaper Rules: The Beginning of the Mystery

Reaper Rules is a short and straightforward game that blends different gameplay styles to tell a story full of surprises. Face a variety of levels — from 2D platforming to top-down shooting — while exploring an intriguing world filled with memorable characters and hidden details.

It’s a compact adventure designed to be played in a single sitting, focusing on pacing, variety, and fun.

Features

■ Short story with a touch of mystery
■ Varied gameplay: platforming, top-down shooting, challenges, and high difficulty
■ Pixel art visuals and charismatic characters
■ An experience made with passion

The journey leaves a few questions unanswered — it’s up to you to interpret, theorize, and imagine what lies beyond this story.

If you enjoy short games with personality and creative gameplay, Reaper Rules is for you.

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese
